Findings.Title: Privileged SPN is linked to CI/CD blast radius
Findings.Detail: appId: aaaaaaaa-bbbb-cccc-dddd-eeeeeeeeeeee and objectId: 11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555 were observed in Azure, GitHub, and ADO.
Findings.Remediation: Rotate credentials and scope RBAC to least privilege.

Findings.Title: User identity appears in cross-tenant workload chain
Findings.Detail: objectId: 99999999-aaaa-bbbb-cccc-dddddddddddd has stale credentials and appears in correlated access paths.
Findings.Remediation: Review user access and require phishing-resistant authentication.
